characters.name: Ashley and Alissa's Mom
characters.description: Ashley and Alissa's Momis a character who made her only appearance in "Aunt Rachel Is Here!". She was portrayed by Renee Michėal. She is the sister ofAshleyandAlissa'sAunt Rachel, and she and her sister both only appeared in "Aunt Rachel Is Here!".  As mentioned in "It's Tradition", she has another sister.

characters.name: Goldilocks and the Three Bears Puppets
characters.description: Goldilocks and the Three Bears Puppetsare puppet characters who only appeared in "Barney Goes To School". They are voiced byBob West.

characters.description: Hannah's Dad(who's known asMr. Morganto Hannah's friends) is a character who only appeared inBarney's Night Before Christmas. He was portrayed byJohn Swasey.

characters.name: Moonkin
characters.description: MoonkinSeries InformationYears1988SeasonsNoneOnly appearanceThree WishesPortrayerNomeMoonkinis a friendly green alien that lives on the Moon. He only appeared inThree Wishes. He communicates in synthesized sounds performed on a synthesizer. Moonkin was born at Moon Dust Hospital in Craterville, a city on the Moon. He is three-and-a-half light years old, and enjoys catching moonbeams and playing pat-a-cake.

characters.name: Scooter Squirrel
characters.description: Scooter SquirrelAppearance InformationSeriesBarney's WorldIn-universe InformationGenderMale Scooter Squirrelis a character inBarney's World. While his character model has been seen throughout the show, he was officially referenced as Scooter in the episode "The Good Apology". It's unclear if he was was the same squirrel in the series prior to his named debut or if it's been different squirrels with the same character model. Scooter is a reference to the characterScooter McNuttyfromBarney & Friends. Unlike Scooter's referenced counterpart, he doesn't talk. Scooter is a squirrel who lives in the park that the children like to play with.
